title: OAP Subscription Agreement
description: A signed Subscription Agreement governing a recurring billing relationship between a principal's agent and a provider. Defined in RFC 0032 section 3.16.1.

subscription_id.description: Globally unique subscription identifier (URN format recommended).

mandate_id.description: The Payment Mandate from which this subscription is derived.

billing_instrument_id.description: The instrument_id from the Wallet operator's Instrument Profile used for recurring billing.

billing_anchor_day.description: Day-of-month anchor for monthly/quarterly/annual billing. Day 29, 30, 31 are clamped to the last day of shorter months.

trial_end.description: End of free trial period. Null if no trial.

cancelled_at.description: Set when the subscription is cancelled. Null while active.

price_change_consent_threshold.description: Maximum price increase the agent may accept autonomously. Increases at or above this amount require principal confirmation.

dunning_state.description: Current dunning state per RFC 0032 section 3.16.3.

dunning_retry_count.description: Number of payment retries performed in the current dunning cycle.
